name: ETH Asset-Specific Trial-00095 Depth Optimization
edge_rationale: Frozen BTC trial-00095 transferred cleanly to ETH, but ETH microstructure may support a modestly different sweep-depth threshold. A small predeclared ETH-only depth grid can test whether ETH improves versus frozen transfer without changing runtime behavior.
counterparty_or_market_mechanism: ETH stop-run and reclaim behavior may be similar to BTC but scaled by different liquidity and volatility. The candidate only remains credible if improvements persist out-of-sample and do not rely on post-hoc threshold rescue.
required_data: Frozen trial-00095 params from research store
1h candles derived from complete 15m candles inside replay temp DB
baseline_reference: ETH_TRIAL_00095_TRANSFER_FEASIBILITY_V1: frozen BTC trial-00095 on ETH, ER 1.804, PF 2.81, 544 full-window trades, 4/4 positive folds.
frozen_assumptions: No production, PAPER, LIVE, runtime, core, execution, orchestrator, settings, sidecar, M4, or production DB changes.
Only ETHUSDT is optimized in this milestone.
No confluence, TFI, CVD, OI, funding, force-order, exit, risk, or portfolio tuning.
No post-hoc rescue: selected variant is chosen from train metrics only.
Full-year walk-forward and 2x cost stress are gates for the selected train champion only.
expected_observation: If ETH sweep depth has asset-specific improvement, the train-selected depth candidate should improve OOS ER by at least 5% versus frozen ETH transfer while maintaining PF, drawdown, cost robustness, and 4/4 positive yearly folds.

kill_criteria.post_hoc_rescue: Changing grid values or selection criteria after seeing results invalidates this milestone.
kill_criteria.source_db_mutation: Mutating the audited ETH source snapshot invalidates this milestone.
kill_criteria.oos_selection: Selecting a variant by OOS metrics instead of train metrics invalidates this milestone.
kill_criteria.insufficient_data: If audited ETH dataset is unavailable, stop rather than substitute unaudited data.

failure_modes: Frozen BTC trial-00095 is already near-optimal for ETH.
Train improvement fails OOS, indicating overfit.
Looser sweep depth raises frequency but degrades ER or drawdown.
Stricter confluence improves ER but reduces OOS sample size below decision grade.
TFI threshold changes overfit to specific ETH regimes.
author: Codex
